data.description:

Canal+ ( (GB:CAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Canal+ SA disclosed that management board member Anna Marsh purchased 25,500 ordinary shares in the company on 18 March 2026. The transaction, carried out on the London Stock Exchange at an aggregate price of about GBP 51,596, was reported in line with UK Market Abuse Regulation requirements.

The share purchase by a senior executive signals internal confidence in Canal+ SA’s prospects and aligns management interests more closely with those of shareholders. Such director dealings are closely watched by investors for insight into insider sentiment and can influence perceptions of corporate governance and long-term value.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CAN) stock is a Hold with a £230.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canal+ stock, see the GB:CAN Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CAN is a Neutral.

Canal+’s overall score is driven by strong technical indicators and positive corporate events, particularly strategic acquisitions and capital management. However, financial performance is hindered by profitability issues and a negative P/E ratio, impacting the valuation score.

To see Spark’s full report on CAN stock, click here.

More about Canal+

Canal+ SA is a European media and entertainment company focused on pay television services and related content distribution. The group operates premium TV channels and platforms, offering subscription-based programming to consumers and leveraging stock market listings to support its capital and governance structure.

data.title: Silicon Metals Names New CEO to Drive Critical Minerals Growth Strategy
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

West Oak Gold Corp. ( (TSE:SI) ) has provided an update.

Silicon Metals Corp., a Canadian explorer and developer of high-purity silica and quartz projects in British Columbia and Ontario, holds 100% interests in several assets including the Maple Birch, Crystal Hills, Ptarmigan Silica, Silica Ridge, and Longworth Silica projects. The company’s Maple Birch Project near Sudbury carries a 3,000 tonne per year production permit, underscoring its early-stage production potential in high-purity quartz.

Silicon Metals has appointed director and professional geoscientist Ray Wladichuk as its new chief executive officer, succeeding outgoing CEO and director Morgan Good. The leadership change signals a push to execute a strategy to grow into a significant critical minerals player, with Wladichuk emphasizing plans to unlock value across the firm’s Canadian silica assets amid what the company sees as a pivotal moment for domestic silica supply in North America.

More about West Oak Gold Corp.

Silicon Metals Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on high-purity silica and quartz assets in British Columbia and Ontario. Its portfolio includes the Maple Birch high-purity quartz project near Sudbury with a 3,000 tonne per year production permit, along with 100% interests in the Crystal Hills, Ptarmigan Silica, Silica Ridge, and Longworth Silica projects in Ontario and British Columbia.

The company is positioning itself as a domestic supplier of critical silica resources in North America, targeting growing demand for high-purity quartz in industrial and technology applications. With multiple exploration-stage and permitted projects clustered near established mining and infrastructure hubs, Silicon Metals aims to leverage its asset base to capitalize on what it views as an inflection point in the North American silica market.

Average Trading Volume: 344,843

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$3.02M

See more insights into SI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Diageo ( (GB:DGE) ) has issued an announcement.

Diageo has disclosed a series of share transactions by three Executive Committee members under its One World Share Incentive Plan. On 17 March 2026, Sally Grimes and Hannah Brooks acquired American Depositary Shares on the New York Stock Exchange, while John O’Keeffe bought ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange, each also receiving matching shares at no cost.

The purchases were made through salary deductions to acquire partnership shares, which were then matched on a 1-for-2 basis, in line with the company’s global share ownership framework. The relatively small volumes indicate routine participation in an established incentive plan rather than a strategic change in ownership, signalling ongoing alignment of senior management with shareholder interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:DGE) stock is a Hold with a £1465.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Diageo stock, see the GB:DGE Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Cellularline Calls 2026 Shareholders’ Meeting on Dividend, Governance and Board Renewal
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Cellularline SpA ( (IT:CELL) ) is now available.

Cellularline S.p.A. has convened its ordinary shareholders’ meeting for 30 April 2026, when investors will be asked to approve the 2025 separate and consolidated financial statements and decide on the allocation of profit. The board will also propose a dividend distribution partly in cash and partly via treasury shares, signalling a mixed payout approach that may affect capital structure and shareholder returns.

Shareholders will vote on the company’s remuneration policy, including both policy approval and past compensation disclosure, highlighting ongoing governance oversight. The meeting will also appoint new boards of directors and statutory auditors and renew authorisation to buy and dispose of treasury shares, decisions that will shape future governance, oversight, and potential capital management flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:CELL) stock is a Hold with a EUR2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cellularline SpA stock, see the IT:CELL Stock Forecast page.

More about Cellularline SpA

Cellularline S.p.A. operates in the consumer electronics accessories sector, focusing on accessories for smartphones and mobile devices. The company targets retail and online channels, serving a broad base of mobile users and distribution partners in Italy and internationally.

Average Trading Volume: 14,773

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €51.69M

data.title: American Eagle Gold Secures C$23 Million Sprott-Backed Financing, Bolstering NAK Exploration War Chest
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

American Eagle Gold ( (TSE:AE) ) has provided an update.

American Eagle Gold has closed a C$23.04 million non-brokered premium flow-through share placement backed by Eric Sprott, who acquired a 9.9% equity stake, adding a third major strategic investor alongside South32 and Teck. A concurrent C$10.9 million flow-through financing with South32 and Teck is expected to close in early April, leaving the company with more than C$55 million in cash to fund substantial drilling expansions at its NAK project through 2027, reinforcing both its exploration plans and its institutional shareholder base.

The offerings, structured as flow-through shares under Canadian tax rules, will be directed to qualifying exploration expenditures on the company’s Canadian mineral properties, with no warrants attached and subject to regulatory approvals including from the TSX Venture Exchange. The strengthened balance sheet and continued support from three prominent sector investors are set to enhance American Eagle’s financial flexibility, execution capacity at NAK, and visibility within the mining investment community.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AE) stock is a Hold with a C$0.85 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on American Eagle Gold stock, see the TSE:AE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AE is a Neutral.

The score is constrained primarily by weak financial performance typical of a pre-revenue explorer (no revenue, rising losses, and significant negative operating/free cash flow), implying continued reliance on financing. This is partly offset by a low-debt balance sheet and stronger equity capitalization, while technicals are currently strong but show overbought risk. Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on AE stock, click here.

More about American Eagle Gold

American Eagle Gold Corp. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration company focused on advancing its NAK copper-gold project in Canada. The company targets critical mineral discoveries and attracts strategic backing from major mining groups, positioning it within the exploration segment of the base and precious metals sector.

Average Trading Volume: 391,495

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$181.7M

Golden Metal Resources Plc ( (GB:GMET) ) just unveiled an update.

Guardian Metal Resources, a Nevada-focused tungsten exploration company, has begun trading on the NYSE American under the ticker GMTL, adding to its existing London and OTC listings. The company’s leadership will mark the milestone by ringing the NYSE American Closing Bell, underscoring its growing presence in U.S. capital markets.

Management expects the U.S. listing to support advancement of its key Pilot Mountain and Tempiute tungsten projects, which it views as strategically positioned to bolster domestic critical mineral supply chains. The move is intended to enhance access to U.S. investors and capital, potentially strengthening Guardian Metal’s role in the emerging U.S. tungsten supply network.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GMET) stock is a Hold with a £226.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Golden Metal Resources Plc stock, see the GB:GMET Stock Forecast page.

Technicals are supportive due to a strong uptrend, but overbought momentum readings raise pullback risk. Valuation provides limited support given negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on GMET stock, click here.

More about Golden Metal Resources Plc

Guardian Metal Resources is a U.S.-focused, exploration-stage mining company specialising in tungsten projects in Nevada. Founded in 2021, it is developing the Pilot Mountain and Tempiute assets, both located in historic tungsten districts with prior mining activity and mineralised occurrences, aiming to underpin a secure, vertically integrated U.S. tungsten supply chain.

Green Energy Group Limited ( (HK:0979) ) has provided an update.

Green Energy Group Limited has agreed to sell a piece of German real estate and certain related assets in two connected transactions to entities associated with director Mr. Pek. The deals involve a property sale for EUR565,000 and an asset sale for EUR80,000, together equivalent to about HK$6.04 million.

Because the purchasers are associates of Mr. Pek, the transactions are aggregated under Hong Kong Listing Rules, making them discloseable deals with at least one percentage ratio above 5% but below 25%. The disposals, subject to specified payment conditions and German land registry procedures, represent a modest balance-sheet reshaping that triggers notification and announcement requirements but not shareholder approval.

data.title: FVCBankcorp Extends Share Repurchase Program Through 2027
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

FVCBankcorp ( (FVCB) ) has issued an update.

On March 19, 2026, FVCBankcorp, Inc. said its board had extended the share repurchase program first launched in 2020, authorizing buybacks of up to 1.4 million common shares, or about 8% of stock outstanding as of Dec. 31, 2025. The program, which allows repurchases via open‑market trades, block deals or private transactions, is scheduled to run until March 31, 2027, unless the board ends it earlier.

Repurchased shares will be cancelled and returned to authorized but unissued status, potentially boosting per‑share metrics for remaining investors and signaling confidence in the company’s valuation. Management retains broad discretion over timing and volume of buybacks based on market conditions, capital needs and alternative uses of cash, and the program can be modified, suspended or terminated at any time with no obligation to repurchase any minimum amount.

The most recent analyst rating on (FVCB) stock is a Buy with a $17.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FVCBankcorp stock, see the FVCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FVCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FVCB is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by the weak/uncertain 2025 cash-flow picture and profitability volatility, despite clear balance-sheet improvement and steady revenue growth. Technicals are supportive but appear overbought, while valuation is reasonable and the recent notes offering is a mixed signal (added capital flexibility but higher debt cost).

To see Spark’s full report on FVCB stock, click here.

More about FVCBankcorp

FVCBankcorp, Inc. is the holding company for FVCbank, a $2.29 billion Virginia‑chartered community bank based in Fairfax, Va., serving commercial businesses, nonprofit organizations and professional service firms in the greater Baltimore and Washington, D.C., metropolitan areas. The locally owned bank, founded in 2007, operates eight full‑service offices across Northern Virginia, Washington, D.C., Baltimore and Bethesda, Md.

The institution focuses on providing banking services to business owners and their employees, positioning itself as a regional community lender in the Mid‑Atlantic market. Its footprint and client base emphasize relationship banking for commercial and nonprofit customers rather than mass‑market retail banking.

Average Trading Volume: 46,091

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $262M
